retry_reason: Failure occurs when the ifindex is zero (invalid attribute) or the device lookup fails; neither condition is transient, so retrying would not succeed.
contract_summary: Acquires a reference on a net_device identified by the BATADV_ATTR_MESH_IFINDEX attribute in a netlink callback. Returns the net_device pointer with an elevated refcount on success, or an ERR_PTR on failure. The caller must release the reference with dev_put() when done. The function does not require any locks to be held by the caller, but the caller must ensure the netlink callback context remains valid (skb and nlh).

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to obtain a net_device with an elevated reference count from an ifindex via batadv_netlink_get_meshif_from_ifindex. The function performs only minimal validation (ifindex check) before calling the actual get operation, making it a focused get-wrapper.
